titles.title: As for Me and My House

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When God delivered Israel from bondage that day, By a prophet a Pillar of Fire to guide them on their way, But true to man's nature and just like today, They looked back toward Egypt and in their hearts fell away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As for me and my house we'll serve only the Lord, We'll walk in His Footsteps believe only His Word, We'll raise up our children in the fear of the Lord, And there'll arise not a generation that knows not the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When Joshua led them over to that promised land, They were happy and rejoicing enemies fell at their hands, But when Joshua's days were ended and he lay down his sword, There arose a generation that knew not the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let us fight the good fight from day to day, And like Moses said to Pharaoh we're off going out to pray, A Lamb for a house with the Blood all applied, We will claim our whole families to march by our side.
